name: Vauxr
description: Vauxr voice device channel plugin for OpenClaw

voiceSystemPrompt.description: System prompt appended to vauxr voice sessions

alsoAllow.description: Extra tool names to grant vauxr-originated agent runs (merged into the target agent's allowlist via toolsBySender). Requires targetAgent.

targetAgent.description: Id of the agent that handles vauxr sessions and should receive the alsoAllow expansion. Required when alsoAllow is set.

token.description: Operator token for Vauxr API auth

voiceSystemPrompt.description: Text appended to the system prompt for all vauxr sessions. Defaults to a voice-optimized instruction set.

alsoAllow.description: Extra tool names to grant vauxr-originated agent runs (merged into the target agent's allowlist via toolsBySender). Requires targetAgent.

targetAgent.description: Id of the agent that handles vauxr sessions and should receive the alsoAllow expansion. Required when alsoAllow is set.
